mainEntity.name: How far is Tribunj from Primošten, and how long is the drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive from Primošten to Tribunj is around 43 km and takes roughly 55 min in normal traffic, a little longer at busy times in summer. I plan the pickup so a slow patch never leaves you rushed.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Primošten to Tribunj?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 90 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, luggage included. A return trip is 180.
At your exact address in Primošten, whether a home, hotel or apartment. Send the address when you book and I will confirm the meeting point.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup time. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
